# eprospera application pay

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/gen-docs.ts. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Synopsis

`eprospera application pay <id> [flags]`

## Description

Apply a fully covering coupon to a legal-entity application.

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | yes | Legal entity application UUID. |

## Flags

| Flag | Aliases | Argument | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--json` |  |  | Pretty-print JSON to stdout and suppress color, spinners, and incidental output. |
| `--raw` |  |  | Print compact single-line JSON to stdout. |
| `--fields` |  | `keys` | Restrict output keys for read commands. |
| `--quiet` |  |  | Suppress incidental human output. |
| `--yes` | `-y` |  | Skip confirmation prompts. |
| `--api-key` |  | `value` | Use this bearer token instead of environment or stored credentials. |
| `--dry-run` |  |  | Validate locally and print the request that would be sent. |
| `--help` | `-h` |  | Show help for a command. |
| `--version` |  |  | Show the CLI version. |
| `--no-auto-json` |  |  | Disable automatic JSON output when stdout is not a TTY. |
| `--skip-scope-check` |  |  | Bypass cached local Agent Key scope preflight. |
| `--coupon` |  | `code` | Coupon code to apply. |

## Environment Fallbacks

| Variable | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `EPROSPERA_API_KEY` | Bearer token when `--api-key` is not provided. |
| `EPROSPERA_BASE_URL` | Override the API base URL. |
| `EPROSPERA_ENV=staging` | Use the configured staging API base URL. |
| `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` | Root directory for plaintext credential fallback. |

## Exit Codes

| Code | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `0` | Success. |
| `1` | Generic failure or unexpected error. |
| `2` | Invalid usage, bad flag, or missing argument. |
| `3` | Authentication failure, including 401 or no credential configured. |
| `4` | Authorization failure, including missing scope or revoked Manifestation of Will. |
| `5` | Resource not found, usually 404. |
| `6` | Conflict, including 409, name collision, or impossible state transition. |
| `7` | Rate limit, usually 429. |
| `8` | Validation error, usually 400. |
| `9` | Timeout, including polling or network timeout. |
| `10` | Application or coupon entered a terminal failure state. |

## Examples

```sh
eprospera --json --yes application pay 00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000 --coupon EXAMPLE_COUPON
```

## Metadata

| Name | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `endpoint` | `POST /api/v1/legal_entity_applications/{id}/pay/coupon` |
| `requiredScope` | `agent:entity.application.pay` |
| `credentialTypes` | `ak, sk` |
